name: fileoctopus
description: Tauri v2 desktop file manager with a Rust-owned filesystem boundary and React TypeScript UI.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @fileoctopus/ts-api build && pnpm --filter @fileoctopus/ui build && pnpm --filter @fileoctopus/frontend build && FILEOCTOPUS_DATA_DIR="${FILEOCTOPUS_DATA_DIR:-$HOME/.fileoctopus-dev}" pnpm --filter @fileoctopus/desktop-tauri tauri dev --features devtools
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml README.md CONTRIBUTING.md SECURITY.md ".github/**/*.{md,yml,yaml}" "docs/**/*.md" "apps/**/*.{ts,tsx,css,json,md}" "packages/**/*.{ts,tsx,json,md}"
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml README.md CONTRIBUTING.md SECURITY.md ".github/**/*.{md,yml,yaml}" "docs/**/*.md" "apps/**/*.{ts,tsx,css,json,md}" "packages/**/*.{ts,tsx,json,md}"
scripts.test:backend:rc: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo check --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test:frontend:rc: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.test:perf-smoke: pnpm --filter @fileoctopus/frontend exec vitest run tests/appShell.test.tsx tests/iconsVirtualization.test.tsx -t "100k entry|icons view virtualization" && cargo test -p fs-core list_streams_without_collecting_all_entries_first
scripts.test:e2e:tauri:build: cargo build --manifest-path apps/desktop-tauri/src-tauri/Cargo.toml && pnpm --filter @fileoctopus/desktop-tauri build && pnpm test:e2e:tauri

simple-git-hooks.pre-push: pnpm format:check && pnpm rc:validate && bash scripts/pre-push-audit.sh
